title: OSCORE not implemented in C firmware
description:
VIOLATION of spec/06-security.md 8.7: C firmware has FIXME(OSCORE) comments indicating OSCORE support is not yet implemented. Application payloads over the C stack are unprotected.

FIXME locations found:
- firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c:272
- lichen/subsys/lichen/l2/lichen_l2.c:279

Required work:
1. Add SCHC rule for OSCORE extension headers
2. Increase buffer sizes for OSCORE overhead (~20+ bytes)
3. Implement OSCORE protect/unprotect in C using uoscore-uedhoc library
4. Integrate EDHOC for key establishment

Reference: modules/lib/uoscore-uedhoc/ library is available
close_reason: Decomposed into sub-beads: project-LICHEN-v1wq (buffer sizing), project-LICHEN-c9th (SCHC rule for OSCORE), project-LICHEN-bt34 (context management), project-LICHEN-cg1m (TX/RX integration), project-LICHEN-dujw (EDHOC subsystem), project-LICHEN-ce9h (Ed25519->X25519 derivation). Implementation order: v1wq (buffer sizes) -> c9th (SCHC rule) -> bt34 (contexts) -> ce9h (key derivation) -> dujw (EDHOC) -> cg1m (integration).
